zh.lifeSummary: 當Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburg於大約1259年出生在德國諾爾德海-維斯特法倫奧培波吉設 可萊斯古莫斯巴賀波恩格時，她的父親Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg43歲，母親Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark20歲。她於大約1266年與Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg在德國福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1322年5月20日之後。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburg于大约1259年出生在德国諾爾德海-維斯特法倫奧培波吉設 可萊斯古莫斯巴賀波恩格时，她的父亲Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg43岁，母亲Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark20岁。她于大约1266年与Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg在德国福萊斯塔阿特 海因里希_賀瑟-納斯奧可萊斯 馬布格结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1322年5月20日之后。

meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

meanings: form of   Sophia .  In the English-speaking world, where it is often taken as a pet form of that name, it has been popular since the 18th century, and has become particularly fashionable since the 1990s.

meanings: Variant of   Ivo  , derived from the oblique case of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburg was born about 1259, in Bernberg, Gummersbach, Oberbergischer Kreis, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany, her father, Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg, was 43 and her mother, Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark, was 20. She married Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg about 1266, in Marburg, Hesse-Nassau, Prussia, Germany. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. She died after 20 May 1322.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburg est née environ 1259, à Bernberg, Gummersbach, Oberbergischer Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Allemagne, son père, Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg, avait 43 ans et sa mère, Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg environ 1266, à Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Prusse, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée après 20 mai 1322.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburg um 1259 in Bernberg, Gummersbach, Oberbergischer Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg 43 und ihre Mutter Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark 20. Sie hat um 1266 in Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Deutschland Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb nach 20. Mai 1322.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburg è nata il circa 1259 nel Bernberg, Gummersbach, Oberbergischer Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Germania, sua padre, Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg, aveva 43 anni e sua madre, Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg circa 1266, nel Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì dopo il 20 maggio 1322.

ja.lifeSummary: Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburgが約1259年にドイツノードルヘイン-ウエストファレンオバーバージッシャー クレイスグンメルスバチバーンバーグで生まれた時，父Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburgは43歳，母Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmarkは20歳であった。約1266年にドイツフレイスタアト プレウssンヘセン-ナッサウクレイス マルブルグでCount Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenbergと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1322年5月20日以後に死去した。

ko.Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Prussia: 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 마버그
ko.Bernberg, Gummersbach, Oberbergischer Kr: 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 오버버지슈어 크레이스 거머스바치 버버그
ko.lifeSummary: Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburg(이)가 대략 1259년 독일 노르드하이-w스트파렌 오버버지슈어 크레이스 거머스바치 버버그에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg(은)는 43세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1266년 독일 프레이스타앳 프레우ss 헤센-나소 크레이스 마버그에서 Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1322년 5월 20일 이후 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburg nasceu aproximadamente 1259, em Bernberg, Gummersbach, Oberbergischer Kreis, Nordrhein-Westfalen, Alemanha, seu pai, Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg, tinha 43 anos e sua mãe, Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg aproximadamente 1266, em Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu após 20 de maio de 1322.

ru.Bernberg, Gummersbach, Oberbergischer Kr: бирнбирг, гуммирсбач, обирбиргищир крис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sophie von Anhalt-Bernburg родилась около 1259 г. в местности бирнбирг, гуммирсбач, обирбиргищир крис, нордраин-вестфеилен, Германия, её отцу по имени Prince Bernhard I of Anhalt-Bernburg было 43 года, а матери, которую звали Sophie Abelsdatter von Schauenburg-Holstein, Princess of Denmark, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg около 1266 г. в местности крис марбург, хессен-нассау, Пруссия, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла после 20 май 1322 г.

Se casó con Count Dietrich II von Honstein Klettenberg aproximadamente 1266, en Kreis Marburg, Hessen-Nassau, Freistaat Preußen, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas.
